owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Reactive capability visibility shipped; next bounded work is owner-ready monthly reactive acceptance guidance plus follow-up refresh

chunks.title: Prepare monthly reactive owner test contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Owner readiness / generated reactive policy pack
chunks.goal: Prepare explicit owner-facing monthly reactive session-test guidance that is only offered when the generated overlay is actually reactive-capable and published, with a clear evidence contract for post-test verification.
acceptance: Owner-facing guidance states exactly what to test for the first monthly reactive branch and what visible harmless marker should appear.
The guidance names the concrete artifacts Codex must inspect afterward instead of relying on anecdotal recall.
If the active overlay is unpublished or only post-session-only, the guidance fails closed to a not-ready/blocked signal instead of suggesting an in-session reactive test.
Regression coverage proves the readiness contract stays aligned with generated-overlay publish/capability state.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after owner reactive test contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after the owner-ready reactive test contract lands.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped reactive capability visibility slice and the owner-ready monthly reactive test contract state.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving completed lifecycle/reactive groundwork chunks as ready.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-05 is replaced, not duplicated.
